headline: Major flooding disrupts industrial corridor
content: Heavy flood warning has shut multiple plants and road routes used by tier-2 suppliers.

headline: Port worker strike intensifies
content: Logistics experts report severe port congestion and vessel backlog across key terminals.

headline: Government announces export ban on rare materials
content: Temporary export ban may impact semiconductor and battery raw material supply.

headline: Cyberattack hits logistics provider
content: Ransomware incident disrupted shipment scheduling systems causing potential delays.
